subtasks.description: Query sam_licenses MongoDB collection to retrieve current Adobe contracted state (product line, license count, contract terms, pricing) for all active Adobe licenses
Query consumption_facts SQL table to retrieve Q4 2024 actual spend by Adobe product line and 90-day usage trend (sum and trajectory) to identify growth/decline patterns

Reconcile Adobe contracted state with Q4 spend and 90-day usage trends. Analyze consumption-to-contract ratios, trend direction, and cost per unit. Generate renewal trajectory (expand, hold, reduce recommendations) by product line with confidence and rationale.

plan.cost_rationale: 3 subtasks required: (1) mongo_query to fetch contracted state—small tier because it's a single-collection query with standard filters on product vendor and status; (2) sql_gen to compute Q4 spend and 90-day trend across consumption_facts—mid tier because it requires aggregation, date windowing, and per-product-line metrics; (3) cross_recon at frontier tier to synthesize contract vs. spend/usage signals, compute utilization ratios, detect trend patterns, and generate strategic recommendations (expand/hold/reduce) with multi-signal reasoning and business context. The frontier tier is warranted because trajectory decisions require inference across three data streams with confidence scoring. Separate policy_action not needed—renewal posture is a recommendation, not governance approval.

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "WITH q4_2024_spend AS (
    SELECT
        product,
        SUM(amount_usd) AS q4_total_spend,
        SUM(daily_active_seats) AS q4_total_active_seats,
        COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS q4_distinct_users,
        COUNT(DISTINCT event_id) AS q4_event_count
    FROM consumption_facts
    WHERE publisher ILIKE '%Adobe%'
      AND event_date >= '2024-10-01'
      AND event_date < '2025-01-01'
      AND fiscal_year = 2024
      AND fiscal_quarter = 4
    GROUP BY product
),
trailing_90_day AS (
    SELECT
        product,
        event_date,
        SUM(amount_usd) AS daily_spend,
        SUM(daily_active_seats) AS daily_seats
    FROM consumption_facts
    WHERE publisher ILIKE '%Adobe%'
      AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
      AND event_date < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY product, event_date
),
trend_calc AS (
    SELECT
        product,
        COUNT(DISTINCT event_date) AS active_days,
        SUM(daily_spend) AS trailing_90d_spend,
        SUM(daily_seats) AS trailing_90d_seats,
        AVG(daily_spend) AS avg_daily_spend,
        STDDEV(daily_spend) AS stddev_daily_spend,
        -- Early half vs late half to determine trajectory
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_date < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '45 days') THEN daily_spend ELSE 0 END) AS first_half_spend,
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '45 days') THEN daily_spend ELSE 0 END) AS second_half_spend,
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_date < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '45 days') THEN daily_seats ELSE 0 END) AS first_half_seats,
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '45 days') THEN daily_seats ELSE 0 END) AS second_half_seats
    FROM trailing_90_day
    GROUP BY product
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(q.product, t.product) AS product_line,
    -- Q4 2024 actuals
    COALESCE(q.q4_total_spend, 0) AS q4_2024_spend_usd,
    COALESCE(q.q4_total_active_seats, 0) AS q4_active_seats,
    COALESCE(q.q4_distinct_users, 0) AS q4_distinct_users,
    -- 90-day trailing metrics
    COALESCE(t.trailing_90d_spend, 0) AS trailing_90d_spend_usd,
    COALESCE(t
